### 📥 Required Models & Paths

Ensure you have the following models placed in their respective folders within `ComfyUI\models\`:

* **Diffusion** (`models\diffusion_models`): [FLUX.2-klein-9B](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-9B/tree/main) *(Requires HF License Acceptance)*
* **LoRA** (`models\loras`): [f2k_consis.safetensors](https://civitai.com/api/download/models/2634354?type=Model&format=SafeTensor)
* **Text Encoder** (`models\text_encoders`): [qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors)
* **VAE** (`models\vae`): [flux2-vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)
* **Upscaler** (`models\upscale_models`): [4x-UltraSharp.pth](https://huggingface.co/Kim2091/UltraSharp/resolve/main/4x-UltraSharp.pth)



For low VRAM usage, make sure to use the 4B version instead of 9B: 
[FLUX.2-Klein-4B](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-4B/tree/main)
